race.comment: O'CALDINO (4) was prominent at the turn and progressed nicely last start to finish a close third over 1900m at Kilcoy after missing the placings at the previous appearance. Likely improver with strong winning prospects. RUGBY (2) did well to score at this track two runs ago. Decent effort last time out when third over 1890m here, beaten 1.5 lengths. Looks well placed so expect a better run this time. JORUM (11) doesn't win out of turn but ran a strong race last time out over 1890m at this course, finishing fourth and beaten 1.75 lengths. Well placed and should be about the mark. GIDDY GAN'S JOY (10) was much better last time and is capable of testing these.
